race.comment: Looks a great race for CAFFETTIERA (8) who ran very well first up, beaten half a length at Pakenham without the best of luck in a small field, trying to get between runners without much room. She showed ability last time in and will be very hard to hold out here. MAGNABELLE ROYALE (6) resumes for her second campaign having won both starts to date, well placed out wide with victories at Dunkeld & Traralgon. Still, she's won a recent trial at Caulfield Heath and a jumpout at Balnarring and can certainly measure up to this. GIN SPIRIT (5) hasn't quite fired this time in but is better than that and could be an improver. VOLATILE (3) is consistent and an each-way hope.
